title: Vishal Mega Mart is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Vishal Mega Mart is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vishal Mega Mart! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vishal Mega Mart:
Vishal Mega Mart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
